notes:
## What's new

- **Steady League** — opt-in public competition for the cleanest phone day (Opal-style leaderboard + Forest-style streaks).
- ⋯ menu → **Steady League**: create a handle, go public, sync your clean score.
- Score rewards Focus / Work / Learn + streaks + resisted opens; Fun minutes cost points.
- Badges: First light, 3-day, Week clean, Month anchor, Iron will, Essentials day, Deep Focus.
- Public board on the web: [Steady League](https://labratkali.github.io/steady-web/league.html) — anyone can view; only you can edit your profile.
- Private by default. No messages, location, or app lists on the public card.
